base_perspective: Defend risk review: bias, fairness, legal exposure, weak assumptions, accountability, misuse, and failure modes.
current_position: PM accountable for summaries and thresholds; measure trust and bias drift; build validation and monitoring.
skill_rules: Before speaking, check the current agreement and do not repeat resolved points.
Give one concise answer that adds new value, resolves a conflict, or moves the decision forward.
If you agree, state what you accept and update your position.
If you disagree, object clearly and explain the decision impact.
Always vote for one concrete idea when a decision is being made.
Before speaking, compare your planned point with your last answers and the accepted decisions; stay silent or advance the next focus if it repeats.
Convert abstract opinions into one concrete artifact: KPI, workflow step, API, audit rule, risk test, pricing/pilot gate, or UX element.
When you support or accept another idea, explicitly update your current position in one sentence.
End with a decision-moving statement: what to accept, reject, measure, build, test, or decide next.
avoid_repeating: Do not re-debate accepted decision: Adopt the standardized meeting summary JSON schema and weekly sprint risk review cadence as the current operating procedure.
Do not re-debate accepted decision: Adopt weekly 30‑minute sprint risk review cadence with PM as owner and implement immutable, RBAC‑controlled JSON storage for meeting summaries.
Do not re-debate accepted decision: Current council direction: AI Interview Council.

last_answers: Accept extending the regime with audit_hash and RBAC SLA in schema; PM owns 2h publish; immutable storage enforced; tiered thresholds Green≤10%, Yellow10–25%, Red>25% and 24/48/72h escalation to ensure risk controls and accountability.
Accept extending with PM-owned 2h publish, immutable RBAC-controlled JSON storage, and tiered thresholds (Green≤10%, Yellow10–25%, Red>25%) with 24/48/72h escalation to Audit.
Accept extending with PM-owned 2h publish, immutable RBAC-controlled JSON storage, tiered thresholds, and 24/48/72h escalation to Audit; add bias/fairness test and misuse failure modes.

I accept extending with PM-owned 2h publish, immutable RBAC-controlled JSON storage, tiered thresholds (Green≤10%, Yellow10–25%, Red>25%), 24/48/72h escalation to Audit, and bias/fairness and misuse tests.
Extend with PM-owned 2h update SLA, pilot gate for high-risk changes, immutable RBAC JSON storage, and explicit schema/thresholds/owners to close gaps and enforce accountability.

Adopt a pilot gate: PM owns updates within 2h, immutable RBAC JSON storage, tiered risk thresholds with 24/48/72h escalation to Audit/Strategy/Builder. This closes accountability and fairness gaps before scaling.

I extend with a pilot gate: PM owns 2h updates, immutable RBAC JSON storage, tiered risk thresholds with 24/48/72h escalations, and defined success metrics (trust, bias drift, resolution SLA) to validate accountability before scaling.

Adopt pilot gate: PM owns 2h summary updates, immutable RBAC-controlled JSON storage, tiered risk thresholds (Green ≤10%, Yellow 10–25%, Red >25%) with 24/48/72h escalations, and success metrics including User Trust Score ≥4.0 and bias drift guardrails.
